Referência completa gerada#

Esta página é o único ponto da documentação Sphinx que expande declarações C++ geradas pelo Doxygen. Ela cobre os headers públicos em FVGridMakerLib/include/FVGridMaker e inclui classes, structs, aliases, conceitos, funções livres, namespaces e arquivos.

Use esta página como índice de consulta; use as páginas temáticas anteriores para entender a organização conceitual da biblioteca.

using NVol = StrongInteger<Size, NVolTag>#
using Seed = StrongInteger<UInt64, SeedTag>#

using BasicXInit = StrongReal<T, XInitTag>#

using BasicXFinal = StrongReal<T, XFinalTag>#

using BasicMinSpacing = StrongReal<T, MinSpacingTag>#

using BasicBeta = StrongReal<T, BetaTag>#

BasicQualityMetrics1D<T> quality_metrics_1d(const BasicAxis1D<T> &axis)#

constexpr std::string_view vtk_scalar_type_name() noexcept#

void write_vtk(const BasicStructuredGrid2D<T> &grid, const std::filesystem::path &filepath)#

auto make_coordinate_mapping_2d(std::string name, std::string first_name, std::string second_name, Map map, CellMeasure cell_measure, FirstFaceMeasure first_face_measure, SecondFaceMeasure second_face_measure, bool vtk_rectilinear = false)#

auto make_basic_coordinate_mapping_2d(std::string name, std::string first_name, std::string second_name, Map map, CellMeasure cell_measure, FirstFaceMeasure first_face_measure, SecondFaceMeasure second_face_measure, bool vtk_rectilinear = false)#
template<class Map, class Measure>
auto make_coordinate_mapping_2d(std::string name, std::string first_name, std::string second_name, Map map, Measure measure, bool vtk_rectilinear = false)#

auto make_basic_coordinate_mapping_2d(std::string name, std::string first_name, std::string second_name, Map map, Measure measure, bool vtk_rectilinear = false)#

std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &output, const BasicStructuredGrid2D<T> &grid)#
